________________________________________________________________

OUR JEWELLERY AND CARE INSTRUCTIONS:

_________________________________________________________________

These are platinum plated with semi precious zirconia stones jewelries.

They are very high grade/quality jewelries

Like all costume jewelleries do not expose to Harsh liquids like perfumes.

Always wipe out body residues after each wear. And store them in a nice dry place

They will last Several years.

They are nickel and lead free so they should not cause skin reactions



Also please remember they are occasional jewelries.  Not an everyday wear.

description:
Brass Metal,

AAA + Cubic Zirconia

Good Quality Plating

Maintain care to avoid discolouration

Please review jewellery care instructions below

________________________________________________________________

OUR JEWELLERY AND CARE INSTRUCTIONS:

________________________________________________________________

Multi Stone Clutch is an elegant accessory designed to bring radiant sparkle
and refined detail to your special occasion style. Crafted with a structured
silhouette, this clutch is adorned with beautifully arranged multi-coloured
stones that catch the light from every angle, creating a vibrant and eye-catching finish.
The polished frame and secure clasp provide both style and practicality,
keeping your essentials safe while maintaining a sleek look. Perfect for weddings, parties,
dinners, and celebrations, the Multi Stone Clutch pairs effortlessly with dresses
and formal outfits. This statement accessory adds colour, shine, and elegance, making it a stunning addition to any fashion collection.
short:
An elegant clutch adorned with vibrant multi-coloured stones, designed to add brilliant sparkle and refined style to special occasion outfits.
Width 20cm

Height 12cm

Depth 5cm

Brass Metal,

AAA + Cubic Zirconia

Good Quality Plating

Care Must be maintained to avoid discolouration

Please review jewellery care instructions below

________________________________________________________________

OUR JEWELLERY AND CARE INSTRUCTIONS:

_________________________________________________________________

These are platinum plated with semi precious zirconia stones jewelries.

They are very high grade/quality jewelries

Like all costume jewelleries do not expose to Harsh liquids like perfumes.

Always wipe out body residues after each wear. And store them in a nice dry place

They will last Several years.

They are nickel and lead free so they should not cause skin reactions



Also please remember they are occasional jewelries.  Not an everyday wear.

refined occasions with bold sophistication. Featuring a structured silhouette
and a distinctive clasp detail, this clutch delivers striking presence while
maintaining polished balance. Its sleek finish enhances evening gowns, tailored ensembles,
and celebration attire, making it ideal for weddings, galas, dinners, and formal gatherings.
Crafted with high-grade materials, Hive Clasp Clutch offers durability alongside
its premium-looking appearance. The compact yet practical interior
holds your essentials securely while preserving its graceful profile.

Stay effortlessly stylish under the sun with the Straw Sun Visor
from Sterlin Glams — where elegant style meets everyday affordability.
Designed for sunny days, beach outings, vacations, brunch dates, and
outdoor events, this chic visor offers breathable comfort while elevating your summer look.

Crafted from high-quality woven straw, the Straw Sun Visor provides
lightweight structure and excellent sun protection without feeling heavy.
Its open-top design keeps you cool, while the wide brim helps shield your face from harsh sunlight — making it perfect for Nigerian heat and tropical getaways.

Also please remember they are occasional jewelries.  Not an everyday wear.

short: Achieve a look of effortless grace with The Pearl-drop Lariat Set . This exquisite four-piece suite is defined by its fluid movement and delicate "Y" silhouette. The necklace features a slender chain adorned with bezel-set crystals that meet at the center to drop into two cascading faux-pearl teardrops. The set is perfectly balanced with linear drop earrings that sway with every turn, and a modern open-cuff bracelet and ring featuring a chic "bypass" design where two pearls embrace the wrist and finger. Available in both a warm Radiant Gold and a cool Icy Silver finish.

charm and refined sparkle. Featuring a beautifully shaped bow crafted in a polished
gold-tone finish, the necklace is accented with delicate bead details along the chain
for added style. A crystal heart drop pendant sits beneath the bow, framed with
brilliant stones that catch the light beautifully. This design brings together
feminine detail and radiant shine, creating a standout accessory for special occasions,
celebrations, and stylish moments Velora Bow Necklace pairs effortlessly with dresses
and elegant outfits, making it a beautiful addition to any jewellery collection while enhancing your overall look.








Also please remember they are occasional jewelries.  Not an everyday wear.
short:
An elegant gold-tone bow necklace featuring a sparkling crystal heart drop pendant for a refined and graceful look.

Necklace Length: 15.5Inches+2Inches Extension

AAA + Cubic Zirconia

Good Quality Plating

Maintain care to avoid discolouration

Please review jewellery care instructions below

________________________________________________________________

OUR JEWELLERY AND CARE INSTRUCTIONS:

________________________________________________________________

These are platinum plated with semi precious zirconia stones jewelries.

They are very high grade/quality jewelries

Like all costume jewelleries do not expose to Harsh liquids like perfumes.

Always wipe out body residues after each wear. And store them in a nice dry place

They will last Several years.

They are nickel and lead free so they should not cause skin reactions



Also please remember they are occasional jewelries.  Not an everyday wear.

Bangle Wrist Size is 17cm

Slightly Expandable to 19cm

OUR JEWELLERY AND CARE INSTRUCTIONS:

_________________________________________________________________

Radiants Orbit Earrings are designed to capture attention with a graceful circular form that
reflects light from every angle. The radiant stones are arranged within a smooth orbit frame, creating a balanced
blend of sparkle and modern elegance. Each detail is carefully crafted to highlight the brilliance of the stones while
maintaining a refined, stylish finish. The circular design symbolises movement and harmony, making these earrings
a striking addition to both occasion styling and polished looks. Radiants Orbit Earrings bring a luminous touch to your
jewellery collection, offering a beautifully crafted piece that enhances your style with shimmering charm and timeless sophistication.
short: Radiants Orbit Earrings feature a radiant circular design with shimmering stones set in a refined orbit frame, creating a brilliant and elegant statement piece.

OUR JEWELLERY AND CARE INSTRUCTIONS:

_________________________________________________________________

The Red Quad Crystal Clutch is a bold statement accessory designed to capture attention with its radiant sparkle.
Featuring a structured silhouette, this clutch is adorned with precisely arranged red crystals that create a striking,
light-catching effect. Its rich tone adds depth and sophistication, making it the perfect complement to both classic and contemporary outfits.
The compact interior is designed to hold your essentials securely while maintaining a sleek profile. Whether styled as a handheld piece or worn with its detachable chain, the Red Quad Crystal Clutch brings confidence, elegance, and standout appeal to any special occasion look.
short: A bold red crystal clutch with a structured design, perfect for adding radiant sparkle to standout occasion looks.

The Ivory Edge Pattern Scarf is a refined accessory designed to bring effortless elegance to your outfit.

Featuring a striking monochrome pattern enhanced with a soft ivory edge, this scarf offers a balanced blend of bold and subtle styling.

Its smooth, lightweight fabric drapes beautifully, making it easy to style in multiple ways. Whether worn around the neck, over the shoulders,

or styled on a handbag, it adds a polished finishing touch. The carefully detailed edges elevate its overall appeal, making it suitable for both casual and occasion wear. The Ivory Edge Pattern Scarf delivers timeless charm and versatility.
